records.summary: vm_reset() returns before MMIO reset completion is observable.
records.disposition_rationale: The MMIO reset hook violates the documented reset-completion contract and needs a transport-side code change.

records.summary: vp_interrupt() drops handled status for config-only and slow-path-only INTx events.
records.disposition_rationale: The interrupt handler services work but reports the wrong IRQ status, so the fix belongs in the return-value composition logic.

records.summary: INTx fallback creates the admin queue at queue_idx++ instead of avq->vq_index.
records.disposition_rationale: Fallback queue creation must preserve the transport-advertised admin-queue index, which requires a code change in the INTx path.

records.summary: PCI modern queue-reset helpers use vp_dev->vqs[] for admin queues instead of vp_dev->admin_vq.info.
records.disposition_rationale: Admin-queue reset uses the wrong metadata owner and requires a transport-side fix in both reset helpers.

records.summary: Queue reset rejoins slow-path queues to virtqueues instead of slow_virtqueues.
records.disposition_rationale: The post-reset reattach logic loses the original dispatch topology and needs a list-selection fix.

records.summary: MMIO teardown frees wake-enabled IRQs without disabling IRQ wake.
records.disposition_rationale: Wake-enabled setup and teardown are asymmetric and need an MMIO teardown fix before freeing the IRQ.

records.summary: virtio_vdpa_find_vqs() uses the sparse descriptor slot for affinity instead of the instantiated queue index.
records.disposition_rationale: The bug is a queue-index mismatch inside the vDPA transport's setup-time affinity programming, so the remedy is a direct code change in virtio_vdpa_find_vqs().

records.summary: virtinput_probe() deletes virtqueues after virtio_device_ready() without resetting the device first.
records.disposition_rationale: The failure path has already crossed into live device state and must mirror the driver's own reset-before-del_vqs teardown ordering, so the fix belongs in the probe unwind code.
